raw.message: Foodie Sizzle feels like a soft daydream, join with me pls

hook.summary: A young man celebrates reaching level 55 in 'Foodie Sizzle' while relaxing on his bed.
hook.visual_action: Man lying on a bed looking at a tablet, then flipping over to play more intensely.
hook.text_overlay: "You look happier" / "Thanks I've been playing Foodie Sizzle all day and finally reached level 55!"

scene_flow: Man lies on bed looking at a tablet with text overlays about his happiness.
He flips onto his stomach to continue playing the game 'Foodie Sizzle'.
He sits up abruptly, cheering and pumping his fist in celebration of reaching level 55.
on_screen_text: "Thanks I've been playing Foodie Sizzle all day and finally reached level 55!"
audience_proxy: Young adult casual gamers who enjoy the sense of achievement from leveling up in mobile games.
